---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: 'feat: <short description>'
labels: enhancement
assignees: Jakub-Syrek
---

## Use case

What are you trying to accomplish? Why is the current behaviour
insufficient?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature you would like to see. Sketches, mockups, links to
examples in other AR/astronomy apps are welcome.

## Alternatives considered

What else could solve the underlying problem? Why is your proposal the
best option?

## Additional context

Anything else — references, papers, datasets, etc.
